headline: Wall Street Initiates Datadog With Buy Rating Ahead of April 3 Investor Day
summary: Benchmark initiated coverage of Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG) with a Buy rating and a $150 price target, framing the cloud observability leader as a top infrastructure pick positioned to capture what the firm sees as a $400 billion agentic AI opportunity. The initiation arrives as Datadog stock trades near $119.67, down 13% year to date, a dynamic ... Wall Street Initiates Datadog With Buy Rating Ahead of April 3 Investor Day

summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher after an explosive rally on Tuesday, sparked by the President’s comments that he wants to end the war soon.
